name: ssot-cli
description: Operate SSOT repositories through a local uv virtual environment using the PyPI-published ssot-registry CLI aliases.

interface.shortDescription: Use a uv venv with the PyPI SSOT CLI.
interface.longDescription: Gives Codex a focused workflow for operating SSOT repositories through a local uv virtual environment with the PyPI-published ssot-registry package, including validation, planning, release, and export commands.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repository with a uv venv running the PyPI ssot-registry CLI.
Validate the current repo with uv run ssot and explain any failures.
Plan a boundary and release flow using uv-run ssot commands from a local venv.
